expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Notification center with unread badges, list, read-state, filtering, and clearing read notifications",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, read/unread state persists across sessions so notifications stay consistent.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Store read state server-side or in persisted store",
        "Read state survives logout/login",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/notificationService.ts", "db/migrations/XXXX_notifications_read_state.sql"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list UI",
      "description": "As a user, see unread badge and open list of notifications so I can inspect messages.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Badge shows unread count",
        "Notification list opens and displays items",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/NotificationBell.tsx", "src/ui/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notification read/unread",
      "description": "As a user, mark single notifications read or unread so I track what I have handled.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Toggle read state via API",
        "UI reflects change immediately",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/notificationService.ts", "src/ui/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, filter notifications to show All, Unread, or Read so I focus on relevant items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add filter control and apply server or client-side filter",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, clear all read notifications to declutter my list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Action removes read notifications from list",
        "Server-side action eventually cleans storage",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/notificationService.ts", "src/ui/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
